intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“Frank 回忆年轻经历 -> 小店修自行车 -> 攒钱买作坊 -> 做飞机零件 -> 工厂雇用 728 人 -> 回到孙子的自行车”的人生闭环读顺。

sentences.text: Yesterday afternoon Frank Hawkins was telling me about his experiences as a young man.
sentences.focus_zh: Yesterday afternoon 先给时间；experiences as a young man 要读成一段回忆的开头。

sentences.text: Before he retired, Frank was the head of a very large business company, but as a boy he used to work in a small shop.
sentences.focus_zh: Before he retired 和 as a boy 形成前后对比；used to 是过去常常，不是 use something。

sentences.text: It was his job to repair bicycles and at that time he used to work fourteen hours a day.
sentences.focus_zh: repair bicycles 是起点；fourteen hours a day 要慢一点，读出过去的辛苦日常。

sentences.text: He saved money for years and in 1958 he bought a small workshop of his own.
sentences.focus_zh: saved money for years 不是一夜成功；of his own 表示属于他自己。

sentences.text: In his twenties Frank used to make spare parts for aeroplanes.
sentences.focus_zh: In his twenties 是二十多岁；spare parts for aeroplanes 连成机器零件的意思。

sentences.text: In a few years the small workshop had become a large factory which employed seven hundred and twenty-eight people.
sentences.focus_zh: had become 读出已经完成的变化；seven hundred and twenty-eight 要分组读清楚。

sentences.text: Frank smiled when he remembered his hard early years and the long road to success.
sentences.focus_zh: hard early years 和 long road to success 要读成回忆，不要读成口号。

sentences.text: She wanted him to repair their grandson's bicycle!
sentences.focus_zh: 最后一句是温暖笑点；repair 和 grandson's bicycle 要稍微收住。
